title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 237.010 - Ferry not to be kept without license
text:
237.010.  Ferry not to be kept without license. — No person shall keep a ferry, so as to demand and receive pay thereat, without a license.
(RSMo 1939 § 15286) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14198; 1919 § 5532; 1909 § 6475
